а§ЃзКЖ зБєа§Ха§Ња§ња§ґа§§ а§ХзРЙ а§Ча§И а§•а•А а•§ -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART IIвАФSEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th June, 2016 G.S.R. 605(E).вАФ In exercise of the powers conferred by section 7A of the Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 (6 of 1991) read with sub-paragraph (4) of paragraph 5 of the Environment Relief Scheme, 2008, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forest notification no. G.S.R. 768(E), dated the 4th November, 2008, namely :- In the said notification, in paragraph 5, in sub-paragraph (4), for the words and figures вАЬ30th of every monthвАЭ, the words and figures вАЬ15th of every monthвАЭ shall be substituted. [F. No. 18-13/91-PL-HSMD (Vol.II)] BISHWANATH SINHA, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 768 (E), dated the 4th November, 2008. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
